code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
let n = tokens.len()

mut best_token = ""
mut best_count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    mut seen_before = false
    mut j = 0
    while j < i
      match tokens.get(j)
      when Some(t2)
        if t == t2
          seen_before = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not seen_before
      mut count = 0
      mut k = i
      while k < n
        match tokens.get(k)
        when Some(t3)
          if t == t3
            count = count + 1
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      if count > best_count
        best_count = count
        best_token = t
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
